rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"lesson","text":"AuthService (Payload-based PBKDF2) is the correct auth mechanism for login endpoints, not UserStore — they are not interchangeable.","scope":"auth"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Route handlers in this project live at src/app/(frontend)/api/ not src/app/api/ — the (frontend) segment matters for routing.","scope":"src/app"},{"kind":"convention","text":"API handlers follow a standard middleware chain: withAuth HOC → rate-limiter → handler, all returning Result<T, E>.","scope":"API handlers"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Input validation uses Zod schemas imported from src/validation/ at the API boundary before any service calls.","scope":"src/validation"}]}
